title: Peppy Chinese Gelatin Stir-fry
description: A peppery, crispy, energizing chinese dish featuring unflavored gelatin, deglazed with a touch of keto-friendly flavors.
instructions: Cut the onions and bell peppers into thin strips. Mince the garlic cloves.
Place the gelatin sheets in a mixing bowl. Sprinkle lime juice over them to help activate. Let sit for about 5 minutes.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic, cook until golden brown and fragrant (about 1 minute).
Add sliced onions and bell peppers to the pan. Stir-fry for approximately 3-4 minutes until slightly softened.
Fold in the activated gelatin sheets into the vegetables, along with red chili flakes for added heat and zestiness.
Deglaze the wok with a tablespoon of hot water from time to time to release any stuck-on bits and enhance flavor. Cook until all liquid evaporates.
Remove from heat when gelatin has fully melted and thickened slightly (around 5-7 minutes).
Serve immediately while warm, garnished with extra chili flakes if desired.
